eit.heading: Core Technology: EIT
eit.p1: Electrical Impedance Tomography (EIT) reconstructs images of impedance distribution using multiple electrodes.
eit.p2: It literally turns the “unseen” into something visible.
eit.p3: By applying small currents via surface electrodes and measuring potentials, EIT visualizes internal states non-invasively and in real time.
eit.p4_prefix: TOMOCLOUD Inc. was founded based on research conducted at

lymphedema.heading: What is Lymphedema?
lymphedema.p1: Lymphedema is a condition in which swelling occurs in the limbs due to impaired lymphatic flow.
lymphedema.p2: Beyond appearance changes, it can cause pain and heaviness, affecting quality of life and work.
lymphedema.p3: Early detection and continuous observation are important, yet truly simple and non-invasive methods have been limited.
lymphedema.p4: We aim to realize an EIT-based monitoring method that can be performed routinely with minimal burden.

product.title: LT monitor
product.lead2: It aims to visualize internal states in real time and enable daily, continuous assessment.
product.b2: Simple, intuitive UI to reduce user burden
